title: Decision Helper
desc: Helps make complex decisions better by breaking them down qualitatively.

title: Finance
desc: Log spending, set budgets, see where the money's actually going. Public demo runs entirely in your browser with CSV import/export.

title: Emotional Well-being
desc: Rate emotional needs by priority and how met they are. Surfaces highest-leverage needs, domain gaps, and which sources (self / friends / romantic / activities / career / other) are over- or under-contributing.

title: Time Tracker
desc: Clock in/out by category with breaks that pause worked time, a Pomodoro timer, and a reward-minutes bank. Syncs to a private Google Sheet.

title: Qualitative Coding
desc: Code text documents with a nested code tree and per-document metadata. Exports canonical JSON and Markdown-with-inline-codes for AI-comparison work.
